item.title: National Gallery will host APY artwork exhibition after paintings cleared of improper interference
item.description: The National Gallery will host an exhibition of art from the Aṉangu Pitjantjatjara Yankunytjatjara Lands three years after a video appearing to show a non-Aboriginal assistant helping to paint an artwork led to it being postponed.

item.title: Barunga Festival 2026 under new management as previous agency claims being 'blindsided'
item.description: The major annual festival of Indigenous art, culture, sport and music will be run by new organisers this year, with previous event planner Sprout saying it was "blindsided" by the change in direction.

item.title: Eight players on Tony Popovic's radar to make the Socceroos 26-man 2026 World Cup squad
item.description: Tony Popovic wants his players to show "toughness" as all Socceroos sides have done in the past, but he wants them to shed the underdog tag. These players could help Australia do that at the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Federation Council to remove Indigenous flags despite overwhelming community support
item.description: Despite strong opposition, the council on the NSW-Victoria border will remove Indigenous flags from its chamber after it was revealed there were no protocols to display them.

item.title: Brown butter, oat and chocolate biscuits that are ready in no time - ABC News
item.description: Salty, sweet, chocolatey and buttery, these cookies are a Frankenstein melding of the best kind.
